rulings.Case Title: NICOLE WOOLDRIDGE VS. ARTHUR STEVEN BROWN, ALSO KNOWN AS STEVE BROWN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Arthur Steven Brown, Also Known As Steve Brown, Norman Sabel, Sylvia Sabel And Sabel Properties Llc, A California Limited'S Motion Compelling Plaintiff To Arbitrate Said Controversy Pursuant To The Term Of The Written Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, Sept. 27, 2012. Line 1 - Defendants Arthur Steven Brown, Also Known As Steve Brown, Norman Sabel, Sylvia Sabel And Sabel Properties Llc, A California Limited'S Motion Compelling Plaintiff To Arbitrate Said Controversy Pursuant To The Term Of The Written Agreement. Arbitration clause void and or does not meet standard per CC 1942.1. Also CC 1954 (a)(4) and Jaramillo vs J H real estate partners 11 CA4 394 =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEIRDRE L. MOY VS. MARIE DANIELLE ASCH-PREVOT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Vacate Ineffective Voluntary Dismissal For Entry Of Involuntary Dismissal With Prejudice Pursuant To Mtn For Summary Judgment, And Attorney Fees; Memo Of P & A
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, Sept. 27, 2012. Line 3 - DEFENDANT MARIE VAN ASCH-PREVOT's Motion To Vacate Ineffective Voluntary Dismissal For Entry Of Involuntary Dismissal With Prejudice Pursuant To Motion For Summary Judgment and attorney fees. Deny 1) Plaintiff filed dismissal prior to public indication of the merits of the case or prior to procedural dereliction making dismissal inveitable. 2) Plaintiffs complaint based on breach of sublet provision of lease. No attorneys fee. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NAY PATEL VS. PHILIP MAYERS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, Sept. 27, 2012. Line 6 - DEFENDANT PHILIP MYERS' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Hearing required. DBI abatement and offset. =(501/REQ)
